assertions.title: Fast-path does not create AsyncStream, StreamingDetokenizer, or ToolCallProcessor

steps.action: Find fast-path code entry point in OpenAIRoutes.swift
steps.expected: Guard condition checks: !isStream && maxTokens==1 && echo && logprobs
steps.observed: Guard condition at line ~352: `if !isStream, chatReq.maxTokens == 1, echoEnabled, logprobsValue != nil || chatReq.promptLogprobs != nil` — matches all four conditions

steps.action: Trace fast-path from route handler to Engine.loglikelihood()
steps.expected: Direct call to engine.loglikelihood() — no streaming objects
steps.observed: Route handler calls `engine.loglikelihood(request: chatReq)` directly (line 360). No AsyncStream, StreamingDetokenizer, or ToolCallProcessor referenced in the fast-path branch (lines 352-395)

steps.expected: Calls model.prepare() or model() directly, computes logSoftmax, returns result
steps.observed: Engine.loglikelihood() (line 1586) acquires generation lock, calls _performLoglikelihood() (line 1660). _performLoglikelihood calls container.perform { ctx.model(batchInput, cache:cache, state:nil) } → logSoftmax → token indexing → returns LoglikelihoodResult struct
grep confirms 0 occurrences of AsyncStream in both loglikelihood() and _performLoglikelihood()
grep confirms 0 occurrences of StreamingDetokenizer in both loglikelihood() and _performLoglikelihood()
grep confirms 0 occurrences of ToolCallProcessor in both loglikelihood() and _performLoglikelihood()

steps.action: Negative test: send normal streaming request
steps.expected: Returns SSE chunks (proves streaming pipeline is used for normal requests)
steps.observed: curl with stream:true returns SSE data: lines with text_completion.chunk objects. Confirms normal path uses streaming (AsyncStream via engine.stream())

evidence.fastPathBranch: Guard: !isStream && chatReq.maxTokens == 1 && echoEnabled && (logprobsValue != nil || chatReq.promptLogprobs != nil). When true, calls engine.loglikelihood() directly and returns serialized JSON response. Falls through to normal path on error.
evidence.codePathTrace: 1) Route handler checks guard conditions → 2) Calls engine.loglikelihood(request:) → 3) Acquires generationLock → 4) Calls _performLoglikelihood → 5) container.perform { ctx.model(batchInput, cache:cache, state:nil) } → 6) logSoftmax over full sequence → 7) Index per-position logprobs for prompt tokens → 8) ArgMaxSampler for single generated token → 9) Build LoglikelihoodResult struct → 10) Route handler builds JSON response with legacy logprobs format
evidence.negativeTestResult: Streaming request (stream:true, max_tokens:5) returned SSE chunks with text_completion.chunk objects, confirming normal path uses AsyncStream via engine.stream()

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-FAST-002 PASSED. Fast-path code confirmed: guard conditions match spec (!isStream, maxTokens==1, echo==true, logprobs set), zero references to AsyncStream/StreamingDetokenizer/ToolCallProcessor in the fast-path methods, code goes directly from model() → logSoftmax → response serialization. Negative test confirmed normal streaming uses SSE pipeline.
